title: Athlete lifecycle — sample transitions
description: Reference examples of common athlete-lifecycle flows for the tenant admin UI's onboarding tour + the /athletes state-machine playground. Every sample is anonymised.

flow.notes: Parent registers via self-serve; welcome notification dispatched
Guardian records consents
Athlete signs up for a team (Wave 3a sibling)
HR pauses following incident report. paused_reason recorded (HR-visible only)
Safeguarding investigation concluded; athlete returned to active
U18 → Adult transition via nightly job
End-of-season graduation with cascade=true; active enrollments closed
Parent invokes /me/athletes/{athlete}/withdraw with withdrawal_reason=relocated + guardian_initiated=true
HR pauses following code-of-conduct violation
Following disciplinary review, HR invokes /withdraw with withdrawal_reason=disciplinary
Signed up at age 12
16th birthday: boundary_crossed=minor_min_age (default). age-group snapshot flips to Adult
18th birthday: boundary_crossed=legal_adult_18. Prior guardian-recorded consents flagged consent_re_record_required=true. Re-consent workflow triggers
Adult athlete self-records consents. consent_recorded_by_user_id transitions from guardian to self
Erroneous archive by admin
Restore within retention window. Consumes 1 unit of athlete_slot. Age-group snapshot recomputed
DOB=2014-06-30 — U10 at signup
Nightly job — resolver detects rolling_from_birthday flip: U10 → U12
Adult athlete signed up. user_id NULL at create; metadata.email_hint set to their email
Athlete verifies email + activates their User account
AutoLinkAthleteToUserOnEmailMatchJob picks up the email match + auto-links. trigger=self_serve_signup
